home.title: Welcome to the Professional Learning Dashboard
home.subtitle: A modern education platform for Admins, Managers, Teachers, and Students.
home.description: Built with React, Vite and Tailwind with RTL support, login, and role-based access.
home.promoText: A modern learning platform for role-based access, multilingual support, and secure admin workflows.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Access the dashboard for your role.
login.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

schedule.weekOverview: Flexible weekly schedule for your role.
schedule.roleSummary: Showing the current week schedule for {role}.
schedule.summaryText: This overview keeps you aligned with expected sessions all week.

about.title: A modern public learning website
about.description: We help education teams connect, publish courses, and support learners in Arabic and English.
about.missionText: Deliver simple, secure learning tools for every role in the school ecosystem.
about.visionText: Enable accessible digital learning that works across devices and languages.
about.valuesText: Clear communication, reliable access, and scalable user experiences.
about.teamText: Our platform is designed for administrators, teachers, and students who need a polished, responsive interface.

courses.title: Featured learning paths
courses.description: Browse a small selection of ready-to-use courses for modern classrooms.
courses.ctaText: Our platform makes it easy to share structured learning experiences for every role.

teachers.title: Experienced faculty
teachers.description: Educators who know how to combine strong instruction with digital tools.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.description: Send a message to our team and we will follow up with more details.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Register now and access your personalized dashboard.
register.help: This is a static registration form prepared for future backend integration.
register.noteText: The form captures structured registration data and validates fields before submission.
